# Rohit Kaushik

> Personal website of Rohit Kaushik -- entrepreneur, computer scientist, and product builder. Senior Software Engineer at Planned, Founding Engineer at Howl. University of Waterloo CS graduate.

## Pages

- [About](/about.md): Background, current work, building philosophy, interests
- [Work](/work.md): Career timeline from 2017 to present with detailed role descriptions
- [Library](/library.md): Publications, technical writings, reading list, podcasts

## Full Content

- [All content in one file](/llms-full.txt): Complete text of all pages concatenated
